---
pagetitle: Ray Wang - Contact
name: Contact Form
page-layout: article
format:
  html:
    grid:
      margin-width: 0px
      sidebar-width: 0px

header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/contact.css">
resources:
  - assets/contact.css
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-5 #note}

# Send me a note {{< fa feather-pointed >}}

You can use this form to contact me about projects, collaborations, or simply to say hello.

I'm always happy to hear from folks working on similar data/Python journeys, or anyone with feedback on something I've written {{< bi heart-fill >}}

<a class="link-dark me-1" href="/accessibility.html" title="Accessibility commitment" target="_blank" rel="noopener">{{< fa universal-access >}}</a>
<a class="link-dark me-1" href="https://linkedin.com/in/" title="LinkedIn" target="_blank" rel="noopener">{{< fa brands linkedin >}}</a>
<a class="link-dark me-1" href="https://github.com/" title="GitHub" target="_blank" rel="noopener">{{< fa brands github >}}</a>
<a class="link-dark me-1" href="mailto:you@example.com" title="Email" target="_blank" rel="noopener">{{< fa envelope >}}</a>

:::

::: {.g-col-1}
:::

::: {.g-col-6 #form}

<!-- TODO: replace the action URL below with your own Formspree form ID
     (sign up at https://formspree.io to get one), or swap this whole form
     for a simple mailto: link. -->
<form
style="margin-top: -5em;"
action="https://formspree.io/f/YOUR_FORM_ID" method="POST" accept-charset="utf-8">


<label for="full-name">Full Name</label>
<input type="text" name="name" id="full-name" class="form-control" placeholder="First and Last" required>

<label for="email-address">Email Address</label>
<input type="email" name="_replyto" id="email-address" class="form-control" placeholder="your@email.here" required>

<label for="message">Message</label>
  <textarea rows="6" name="message" id="message" class="form-control" placeholder="Type your message here..." required></textarea>

<button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary mt-4">Send message</button>
</form>

:::

:::
<!-- end grid -->
